name: Ruthy Walker
ai_summary: Ruthy Walker is a 19-year-old Georgia Army National Guard member with extensive childcare experience since age 15, including siblings, babysitting, and teaching life skills. She is patient, charismatic, and seeks part-time work around her school and drill schedule, with a conflict resolution style that separates children and emphasizes understanding and kindness.
